case_title: KATHY OBER VS. D.F.P.F. CORPORATION DBA FINELINE CONSTRUCTION ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OBER, KATHY AS TO DEFENDANT D.F.P.F. CORPORATION DBA FINELINE CONSTRUCTION WINFIELD HILL, INC. BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-28-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KATHY OBER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS D.F.P.F CORPORTATION DBA FINELINE CONSTRUCTION, WINFIELD HILL, AND BRIDGE HOUSING ARE NOT PRESENT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT STILL PENDING. PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
